Table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

Card of table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

Name

MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

Code

MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

 

T_DCE2_ORDER_STATUS

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

ORDERNO AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

ORDERSTATUS AS LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS_BK,

TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(STATUSDATETIME) AS LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS_DATETIME,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(STATUSDATETIME) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY ORDERNO, ORDERSTATUS,STATUSDATETIME

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(STATUSDATETIME)

ELSE __LOAD_TS

END AS VALID_FROM

--[remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_ORDER_STATUS

WHERE

(

STATUSDATETIME IS NULL

OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(StatusDateTime) <= DATEADD(hour, 24, __load_ts)

)

;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: ORDERNO, ORDERSTATUS

Primary key(s) Target: ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

Historization: SCD2 (use COALESCE(STATUSDATETIME, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT o.*

FROM MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS o

LEFT JOIN TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_HEADER oi

ON oi.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK = o.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK

AND oi.VALID_FROM >= o.VALID_FROM

AND oi.VALID_FROM < o.VALID_TO

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = oi.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

AND oi.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND oi.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR oi.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR oi.COUNTRY_ISO_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

CKT_MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGIST


Server validation rule of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

drop table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS (
ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS_BK TEXT not null,
LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS_DATETIME DATETIME,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTI primary key (ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS set comment = 'This table keeps track of the status of the orde (received, processed, shipped, returned - LSP (Logistic Servvice Provider)';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Order number / identifier of the order assigned to the transaction.';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS.LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS_BK is
'Status of the order from Logistic Service Provider (LSP).';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS.LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS_DATETIME is
'Timestamp of the order status from Logistic Service Provider (LSP).';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active ';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active ';

comment on column MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';

Column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

VALID_FROM: SCD Type 2 start timestamp selected via cascading fallback- use StatusDateTime; if null/invalid or not granular enough (identical across records) fall back to technical __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

CKC_VALID_FROM_MDE_HYBR

Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (StatusDateTime → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

ACTIVE_FLAG

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table MDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_LOGISTIC_ORDER_STATUS

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.9999-12-31
